full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #38 (2026-05-21)

PULSE
Health: 0.5326 (C). 1016 wallets, 275 contributors. 52 memos today vs 149 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
56 reward payments, 396937 PFT distributed to 23 contributors. Top earner: raL2kv...Gwzd (76785 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 15,200 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (8,200 PFT). Lowest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (7,000 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (41,300 PFT, avg 8,260/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rhwiJx...2TaE (84 memos). Fastest new contributor: rhwiJx...2TaE (21.0 memos/day in 4 days). 87 new wallet(s) this week. 38 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 72.1%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-21): 190 transactions from 30 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
